subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter hath arrived wherein thou hadst sought permission to attain His presence. Now, praise be to God, thou art in Qamrud [3.5s]... ...As to the organization of the schools: if possible the children should all wear the same kind of clothing, even if the fabric is varied
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید اجازه حضور خواسته بودید حال آنجناب الحمد لله در قمرود
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @courtesy; culture [adab], @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir]
